_**User (2025-12-08 17:12:21Z)**_

Perfect, another thing, when there is more bookings I need a way to see them all, without leaving calendar view. Create a modal that will open by clicking on "+x more" part and it will show names of all bookings. Does it makes sense to you? Ask any additional questions

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

That makes perfect sense! A modal is a great solution for viewing all bookings for a day without leaving the calendar view.

A few questions to make sure I implement this exactly how you want it:

1. **Modal content** - Should the modal show just the guest names, or also include:
   - Room numbers?
   - Booking status (color-coded)?
   - Check-in/check-out dates for that specific booking?

2. **Modal title** - Should it show the date, like "Bookings for December 15, 2025"?

3. **Clickable bookings** - Should the booking entries in the modal be clickable links to the booking detail page (like they are in the calendar cell), or just read-only text?

4. **What if there are 3 or fewer bookings?** - Should we:
   - Still allow clicking on the day/bookings to open the modal, OR
   - Only show the modal trigger ("+X more") when there are more than 3 bookings?

Let me know your preferences and I'll implement it!

---

4. only when there is more than 3

[map[explanation:Add modal_date and modal_bookings to socket assigns in mount filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/calendar.ex newString:  @impl true
  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    today = Date.utc_today()

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:year, today.year)
      |> assign(:month, today.month)
      |> assign(:modal_date, nil)
      |> assign(:modal_bookings, [])
      |> assign_helpers()
      |> load_calendar_data()

    {:ok, socket}
  end oldString:  @impl true
  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    today = Date.utc_today()

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:year, today.year)
      |> assign(:month, today.month)
      |> assign_helpers()
      |> load_calendar_data()

    {:ok, socket}
  end] map[explanation:Add event handler for showing day bookings modal filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/calendar.ex newString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("today", _params, socket) do
    today = Date.utc_today()

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:year, today.year)
      |> assign(:month, today.month)
      |> load_calendar_data()

    {:noreply, socket}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("show_day_bookings", %{"date" => date_string}, socket) do
    date = Date.from_iso8601!(date_string)
    bookings = CalendarHelpers.bookings_for_date(socket.assigns.bookings, date)

    {:noreply, assign(socket, modal_date: date, modal_bookings: bookings)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("close_modal", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, assign(socket, modal_date: nil, modal_bookings: [])}
  end oldString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("today", _params, socket) do
    today = Date.utc_today()

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:year, today.year)
      |> assign(:month, today.month)
      |> load_calendar_data()

    {:noreply, socket}
  end] map[explanation:Make the +X more text clickable to open modal filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/booking_live/calendar.ex newString:        <%!-- Show count if more than 3 bookings --%>
        <%= if length(@bookings) > 3 do %>
          <button
            type="button"
            phx-click="show_day_bookings"
            phx-value-date={@date}
            class="text-[10px] text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 font-medium text-center pt-1 w-full hover:underline cursor-pointer"
          >
